email.title: Email Data Usage
email.infoBanner:
When scanning for data breaches, your email address is checked against known breach databases. 
Click the service for details:
email.content: Your email address is sent to XposedOrNot to check against their database of known data breaches. The service does not store your email for purposes beyond the immediate check.
email.notice: By using this feature, you consent to your email address being shared for breach verification.

file.title: File Data Usage
file.infoBanner: When scanning files, attachments are sent to third-party security services. No personal data content is shared or saved. Click the service for details:
file.content: Files are submitted to MetaDefender Cloud for multi-scanning malware detection. Results may be stored in their database for improved threat intelligence.
file.notice: By using this feature, you consent to file sharing for security verification.

pswd.title: Password Data Usage
pswd.infoBanner: When checking password strength, your password is processed locally in your browser. No password data is transmitted or stored. Click the service for details:
pswd.content: The zxcvbn library runs entirely in your browser to evaluate password strength. Your password is never sent to any server and all processing happens locally on your device.
pswd.notice: This feature is designed with privacy in mind and keeps your password data secure.

url.title: URL Data Usage
url.infoBanner: When scanning URLs, suspicious links are sent to third-party security services. No personal data content is shared or saved. Click each service for details:
url.content: URLs are submitted to VirusTotal's database and become part of their public repository.
url.content1: URLs are only checked through crypto scam database, no data is being sent or shared.
url.content2: URLs are analyzed and screenshots of the websites may be captured. Results may be publicly accessible in their database.
url.notice: By using this feature, you consent to URL sharing for security verification.
